On the Traces of the Silk Road Black Market

Brief

This challenge is based on publicly documented information related to Ross Ulbricht,
creator of Silk Road.
All elements are used exclusively for OSINT training purposes.

No private, leaked, intrusive, or unethical methods are allowed.

Background

In 2010, before his arrest, Ross Ulbricht celebrated his girlfriend’s birthday at a specific location.
Through careful open-source analysis of information publicly available from that period,
it is possible to determine:

The exact name of the location linked to the birthday celebration
The girlfriend’s day and month of birth, which can be inferred from contextual clues found within legal, publicly accessible sources
The solution does not require guessing or access to restricted data.
It can be identified through advanced OSINT methodology.

Objective

Using only lawful and open-source intelligence techniques, identify:

The name of the location associated with the 2010 birthday event
The girlfriend’s day and month of birth

Rules

Use only legal, open-source information
No contact with any individuals
No intrusion, access bypassing, or password attempts
No use of private or leaked data

Solution

I use the investigation methodology proposed for OSINT industries to share investigation techniques and tips for the CTF challenges. It mentions the following steps:

General OSINT Workflow:

  1. Define — What are you looking for?
  2. Collect — Gather all available data points
  3. Pivot — Use one finding to discover more
  4. Verify — Cross-reference across sources
  5. Document — Keep notes and screenshots

As this workflow mentions, I start defining what I'm looking for. In this case the objective is to find the following:

  • The name of the location associated with the 2010 birthday event
  • The girlfriend’s day and month of birth

But I don't know who Ross Ulbricht's girlfriend was in 2010; I need to know it first, and it adds a subpoint to the objective in the brief: find out who the girlfriend was in 2010.

I start the collection phase with a Google search using the dork "Ross Ulbricht" + "girlfriend". One of the results is a CBS News note about a Ulbricht ex-girlfriend; she is a woman called Julia Vie, and it mentions the alias Vivian's Muse.

Image from the CBS page

They indicate that they met when she was in the first year of Penn State University in Texas and dating while Ross created Silkroad in 2011; it can indicate that they were dating in 2010, and then I used Julia Vie to search about the birthday event.

This page also has linked a video documentary about the Silk Road where Julia Vie appears talking to the camera in an interview.

I decide to search for Julia's birth date using the following dork: "julia vie" + "birthday" and it returns an Instagram post from September 25, 2020. The account name is vivianmuse, the same alias mentioned in the CBS note, and a girl with physical similarities to the picture in CBS News. The post mentions the following:

`It’s my birthday! I can’t believe I am finally 30! 🍉😍🤩🥳💕🎂🔥will be having a party!`

With this I can know that the possible birthday is on September 25 or a close range; another result is Julia's profile on the page The Movie Database. Here the birthday is empty but mentions Austin, Texas, USA, as the place of birth.

I also try to find past posts in the Instagram account, maybe something with Ross Ulbricht, and also in her Facebook account, but in the 2010 post she does not mention anything about a birthday, so I move to another search now. Using the place of birth "julia vie" "austin, tx".

With this last search adding Austin, Texas, I found the Yelp profile of Vivian's Muse. Yelp is a page where the users write reviews and rate the places that they visit, but in this case Vivian's Muse is the photography studio of Julia Vie. Then I searched on Yelp for the Julia Vie profile, and I found 2 profiles, both with 3 reviews, but nothing useful for this challenge.

In the main page of Yelp, using the area filter with Austin, Texas I observed multiple reviews for many Austin places, and then I thought that maybe it is popular with the people of Austin, Texas, and using the previous data that Julia and Ross met in that same city, I also searched on Yelp for a profile of Ross. It returned 3.

It's important to mention, because of Ross's fame from the Silk Road, there are a lot of fake profiles on multiple social media platforms. Then I checked the 3 Yelp profiles to filter and review the reliability of each one. Based on the location Austin, TX, and the friends' number (481), I found the following profile to be the most reliable.

Ross Ulbricht Yelp Profile

It has 3 reviews, all from 2010, and the last from September 29, 2010, is about Vivian's Muse, the studio of Julia Vie, which I can use as a verification linking the profile of Ross with his ex-girlfriend Julia.

The oldest review from September 28, 2010, in the Ross Profile is interesting because it mentions the following:

This place was quite delicious. I took my girlfriend for her birthday, & they surprised us with a candle & "Happy Birthday" written on her plate around dessert time. The wait staff are very friendly & the ambience is awesome..

This review is about the place called Aquarelle in the Market District, Austin.

Now a resume of the found information:

  • Girlfriend name: Julia Vie
  • Birthday: September 25 or a close range
  • Location associated with the 2010 birthday event: Aquarelle

In the CTF flag submit field I used September 25 and Aquarelle as the answer, but it was wrong. Then I changed it for the date in the review, and it was accepted as the answer.

Challenge Answer

  • The name of the location associated with the 2010 birthday event: Aquarelle
  • The girlfriend’s day and month of birth: September 28 (09-28)

Note about challenge learning

In this challenge I try to search with a wrong focus, searching for pictures from 2010 on Facebook and Instagram of Ross Ulbricht and his ex-girlfriend, but I remember to always check the simple first, in this case the Yelp reviews. The Ross profile reveals the answer. Also, verify the multiple profiles more when there is a high chance to the profiles are fake.
